plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-101 RP01.P04.M06.S05-RP01.P05.M09.S03 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.scope: RP01 Risk C synthetic fixture catalog, denied/review UI fixture states, P04 evidence/review/handoff packet coverage, and P05 synthetic fixture/golden-case catalog through RP01.P05.M09.S03.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-101 core domain synthetic fixture catalog pack
